title: Efficacy of Bright Light Treatment Fluoxetine and the Combination in Patients With Nonseasonal Major Depressive Disorder
notes: RCT of fluoxetine vs light vs combination vs placebo for MDD; Canadian PIs (Lam, Levitt, Levitan at UBC/U Toronto); published 2016; main trial results

title: Hydromorphone Compared With Diacetylmorphine for Long-term Opioid Dependence
notes: Phase 3 RCT; pharmacological (hydromorphone vs diacetylmorphine) for opioid use disorder; Vancouver BC Canada site; published 2016; main trial results (SALOME trial)

title: Olanzapine Versus Placebo in Adult Outpatients With Anorexia Nervosa
notes: RCT of olanzapine for anorexia nervosa at 5 North American sites; Canadian site (Allan Kaplan listed) plausible but not explicitly confirmed in abstract; need full text to verify Canadian recruitment site

title: Single repeated and maintenance ketamine infusions for treatment-resistant depression
notes: RCT (crossover then open-label); ketamine for TRD; single Canadian site (Ottawa); Phillips/Blier are Canadian PIs; published 2019; main trial results

title: Efficacy of Adjunctive Infliximab vs Placebo in the Treatment of Adults With Bipolar I/II Depression
notes: RCT of infliximab for bipolar depression; 2 sites in Canada and US; Canadian PI (McIntyre); published 2019; main trial results

title: Randomized Placebo-Controlled Trial of Nabilone for Agitation in Alzheimer's Disease.
notes: RCT (crossover) of nabilone for agitation in AD; Canadian sites (Herrmann/Lanctot at Sunnybrook Toronto); published 2019; main trial results

title: Metformin for Treatment of Overweight Induced by Atypical Antipsychotic Medication in Young People With Autism Spectrum Disorder
notes: Pharmacological intervention (metformin) targets antipsychotic-induced weight gain NOT a mental disorder itself; ASD is the underlying condition but metformin is not treating ASD; excludes per criterion 3

title: Single and repeated ketamine infusions for reduction of suicidal ideation in treatment-resistant depression.
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS of PMID 30922101 (the ketamine RCT); explicitly states 'secondary analysis' examining SI outcomes from the parent trial; excludes per criterion 5

title: Effect of Methylphenidate on Apathy in Patients With Alzheimer Disease: The ADMET 2 Randomized Clinical Trial.
notes: RCT of methylphenidate for apathy in AD; 9 US + 1 Canadian site; published 2021; main trial results (ADMET 2)

title: Effect of Continuing Olanzapine vs Placebo on Relapse Among Patients With Psychotic Depression in Remission: The STOP-PD II
notes: RCT of olanzapine continuation for psychotic depression; 4 academic medical centers; Mulsant (Toronto) is co-PI suggesting Canadian site but abstract does not explicitly name Canadian recruitment; need full text

title: Effectiveness of Sequential Psychological and Medication Therapies for Insomnia Disorder
notes: SMART RCT of BT and zolpidem sequences for insomnia disorder; Universite Laval Quebec City Canada is explicit site; published 2020; main trial results

title: Treating Insulin Resistance With Metformin as a Strategy to Improve Clinical Outcomes in Treatment-Resistant Bipolar Depression (TRIO-BD)
notes: RCT of metformin for TRBD (targeting depression via insulin resistance reversal); 2-site trial; Canadian PI (Calkin at Dalhousie); published 2022; main trial results

title: Exploratory Tau Biomarker Results From a Multiple Ascending-Dose Study of BIIB080 in Alzheimer Disease.
notes: Phase 1b dose-finding study with biomarker endpoints (CSF tau and tau PET); not a main efficacy trial for clinical outcomes; 12 sites in Canada and Europe; phase 1b exploratory biomarker study is not main trial results per criterion 5

title: Agomelatine or placebo as adjunctive therapy to a mood stabiliser in bipolar I depression
notes: RCT of agomelatine for bipolar depression; multinational (Agomelatine Study Group); abstract does not specify Canadian sites; Yatham (UBC) is first author but Canadian co-author alone is NOT sufficient per criterion 4; need full text to verify

title: Heterogeneity of treatment response to citalopram for patients with Alzheimer's disease with aggression or agitation: The CitAD
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS of the CitAD trial assessing heterogeneity of response and predictors; the main CitAD trial was published earlier; this is a post-hoc subgroup analysis; excludes per criterion 5

title: Lurasidone versus treatment as usual for cognitive impairment in euthymic patients with bipolar I disorder
notes: RCT of lurasidone for cognitive impairment in euthymic bipolar I; UBC Hospital Vancouver Canada; Yatham PI; published 2017; main trial (pilot) results

title: Efficacy of adjunctive infliximab vs placebo in the treatment of anhedonia in bipolar I/II depression
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS of the infliximab bipolar depression trial (PMID 31066887); explicitly states 'secondary analysis' with anhedonia (SHAPS) as outcome; excludes per criterion 5

title: Psilocybin-assisted psychotherapy for treatment resistant depression
notes: RCT of psilocybin-assisted psychotherapy for TRD; Canadian PI (Rosenblat at U Toronto); published 2024; main trial results

title: Feasibility and safety of extended-release naltrexone treatment of opioid and alcohol use disorder in HIV clinics
notes: RCT of XR-naltrexone for OUD/AUD in HIV clinics; Vancouver BC Canada is explicit site; published 2017; main trial results (pilot/feasibility)

title: Extracellular Vesicle Biomarkers Reveal Inhibition of Neuroinflammation by Infliximab in Association with Antidepressant Response in Adults with Bipolar Depression
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS of the infliximab bipolar depression trial (PMID 31066887); biomarker mechanistic study using NEVs from parent trial samples; excludes per criterion 5

title: Micronutrients for ADHD in Youths (MADDY)
notes: RCT of micronutrients (vitamins/minerals) for ADHD; 3 sites in North America; micronutrients may not qualify as pharmacological intervention per strict definition; need full text to verify if any Canadian site

title: Efficacy of Adjunctive D-Cycloserine to Intermittent Theta-Burst Stimulation for Major Depressive Disorder
notes: RCT of D-cycloserine adjunct to iTBS for MDD; single Canadian site (McGirr at U Calgary); published 2022; main trial results

title: Methylene blue treatment for residual symptoms of bipolar disorder: randomised crossover study.
notes: RCT (crossover) of methylene blue for bipolar disorder residual symptoms; Canadian PIs (Alda at Dalhousie; MacQueen at Calgary); published 2017; main trial results

title: Optimal duration of risperidone or olanzapine adjunctive therapy to mood stabilizer following remission of a manic episode: A CANMAT randomized double-blind trial.
notes: CANMAT RCT of risperidone/olanzapine duration for bipolar I; Canadian multisite trial (CANMAT = Canadian Network); published 2016; main trial results

title: A randomized double-blind placebo-controlled crossover trial evaluating the effect of intranasal insulin on cognition and mood in individuals with treatment-resistant major depressive disorder.
notes: RCT (crossover) of intranasal insulin for TRD; Canadian PIs (McIntyre at U Toronto; MacQueen at Calgary; Kennedy at U Toronto); published 2017; main trial results

title: Brain serotonin synthesis capacity in obsessive-compulsive disorder: effects of cognitive behavioral therapy and sertraline.
notes: RCT of CBT vs sertraline for OCD with PET imaging; small sample (n=16); abstract does not clearly state Canadian recruitment sites; Benkelfat/Leyton at McGill suggests Canada but need verification; also primary intervention may be CBT not pharma

title: Optimizing Outcomes of Treatment-Resistant Depression in Older Adults (OPTIMUM).
notes: This is a STUDY DESIGN/METHODS paper describing the first 396 participants; not main trial results; explicitly describes methodology and enrollment challenges; excludes per criterion 5 (protocol/design paper)

title: The association between lithium use and neurocognitive performance in patients with bipolar disorder.
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS from a multi-site clinical trial of lithium monotherapy; cross-sectional and longitudinal analysis of neurocognitive outcomes; not the main trial results publication; excludes per criterion 5

title: Norepinephrine transporter gene variants and remission from depression with venlafaxine treatment in older adults
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS (pharmacogenomic) from a three-site clinical trial of venlafaxine; analyzing genetic predictors of remission; not main trial results; excludes per criterion 5

title: The network structure of core depressive symptom-domains in MDD following antidepressant treatment: a randomized clinical trial.
notes: Network analysis of depressive symptoms from an RCT of escitalopram vs desvenlafaxine; Canadian PI (Berlim/Turecki at McGill); may be secondary analysis of symptom structure rather than main efficacy results; need full text

title: Evaluation of BI 409306 a novel phosphodiesterase type 9 inhibitor in two phase II studies in prodromal and mild Alzheimer's disease.
notes: Phase II RCT of BI 409306 for prodromal/mild AD; multinational (North America/Europe); abstract does not specify Canadian sites; need full text to confirm Canadian recruitment

title: A Randomized Placebo-Controlled Discontinuation Study of Cholinesterase Inhibitors in Institutionalized Patients With Moderate to Severe Alzheimer Disease.
notes: RCT of ChEI discontinuation in institutionalized AD patients; Canadian PIs (Herrmann/Lanctot at Sunnybrook Toronto); published 2016; main trial results

title: Factors associated with relapse in schizophrenia despite adherence to long-acting injectable antipsychotic therapy.
notes: POST-HOC exploratory analysis of a risperidone LAI trial (NCT00297388); analyzing predictors of relapse; not main trial results; excludes per criterion 5

title: Impact of Reference and Target Region Selection on Amyloid PET SUV Ratios in the Phase 1b PRIME Study of Aducanumab.
notes: METHODOLOGICAL/SECONDARY ANALYSIS of PET imaging from the PRIME phase 1b aducanumab trial; not main trial results; biomarker methodology paper; excludes per criterion 5

title: Donepezil for gait and falls in mild cognitive impairment: a randomized controlled trial.
notes: RCT of donepezil for gait/falls in MCI; Canadian PIs (Montero-Odasso/Chertkow/Borrie); pharmacological intervention but targeting gait/falls NOT a mental disorder; MCI is not a diagnosed mental disorder per DSM-5/ICD criteria; may exclude per criteria 2 and 3

title: Exploring brain insulin resistance in adults with bipolar depression using extracellular vesicles of neuronal origin.
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS of the infliximab bipolar depression trial (PMID 31066887); biomarker mechanistic study of insulin signaling using NEVs; not main trial results; excludes per criterion 5

title: A Randomized Placebo-Controlled Trial of Metformin for the Treatment of Overweight Induced by Antipsychotic Medication in Young People With Autism Spectrum Disorder: Open-Label Extension.
notes: OPEN-LABEL EXTENSION of PMID 27556593 metformin trial; not main trial results (extension study); also metformin targets weight gain not a mental disorder; excludes per criteria 3 and 5

title: Vortioxetine improves symptomatic and functional outcomes in major depressive disorder.
notes: Post-hoc analysis of a multinational RCT (NCT01564862) of vortioxetine for MDD using novel dual outcome measure; abstract states 'this analysis evaluated'; likely secondary analysis; multinational trial with no explicit Canadian sites mentioned; need full text

title: A randomized comparison of long acting methylphenidate and cognitive behavioral therapy in the treatment of binge eating disorder.
notes: RCT of methylphenidate vs CBT for BED; Canadian PI (Quilty/Kaplan at CAMH Toronto); published 2019; main trial results

title: Comorbid anxiety in late-life depression: Relationship with remission and suicidal ideation on venlafaxine treatment.
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS from a multisite clinical trial of venlafaxine in older adults; analyzing comorbid anxiety as predictor; Mulsant (Toronto) is co-author but this is secondary analysis; excludes per criterion 5

title: Peripheral inflammatory biomarkers define biotypes of bipolar depression.
notes: SECONDARY ANALYSIS of the infliximab bipolar depression trial (PMID 31066887); machine learning biotype analysis of cytokine data; not main trial results; excludes per criterion 5
